pr.title: Record: Two-Level Dirichlet Posterior Mixing — 0.11968 BPB

output.summary: Hierarchical Dirichlet smoothing uses the neural LM as base measure, recursively backing off 2–15-grams into a phrase suffix cache for two-level Bayesian mixing.
techniques: Dirichlet posterior mixing across n-gram orders
Phrase suffix cache with Dirichlet combination
Neural LM as base measure for hierarchical Bayesian smoothing
